productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Chewang Blue Flip Flops
description: The adidas Chewang slides you into that leisure-bound stride with a simple thong design to hold your foot in place, and a quick-drying EVA upper when things get a little wet and wild. Upper Quick-drying EVA upper for dry comfort for the feet Thong construction to hold the forefoot in place, and added comfort and style Midsole Foam footbed with graphics and brand mark for cushioned all-day comfort and style Outsole Textured rubber outsole for grip and stability Flip flop care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
